zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Clifford於1353年10月15日出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford20歲，母親Maud de Beauchamp18歲。她於大約1381年與Ralph Greystoke在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1413年4月23日在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Clifford于1353年10月15日出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford20岁，母亲Maud de Beauchamp18岁。她于大约1381年与Ralph Greystoke在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1413年4月23日在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Clifford was born on 15 October 1353, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, was 20 and her mother, Maud de Beauchamp, was 18. She married Ralph Greystoke about 1381, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 April 1413, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Clifford est née le 15 octobre 1353, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Maud de Beauchamp, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Greystoke environ 1381, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1413, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Clifford am 15. Oktober 1353 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford 20 und ihre Mutter Maud de Beauchamp 18. Sie hat um 1381 in Yorkshire, England Ralph Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. April 1413 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Clifford è nata il il 15 ottobre 1353 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Maud de Beauchamp, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Greystoke circa 1381, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1413, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Cliffordが1353年10月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Cliffordは20歳，母Maud de Beauchampは18歳であった。約1381年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRalph Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1413年4月23日にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clifford(이)가 1353년 10월 15일 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Beauchamp(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1381년 영국 요르크실르에서 Ralph Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1413년 4월 23일 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 October 1353–23 April 1413: 15 de outubro de 1353–23 de abril de 1413
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Clifford nasceu em 15 de outubro de 1353, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Beauchamp, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Greystoke aproximadamente 1381, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1413, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Clifford родилась 15 октября 1353 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Beauchamp, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Greystoke около 1381 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 апреля 1413 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.15 October 1353–23 April 1413: 15 de octubre de 1353–23 de abril de 1413
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Clifford nació el 15 de octubre de 1353, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Maud de Beauchamp, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ralph Greystoke aproximadamente 1381, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1413, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
